creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2009-01-27 19:48:39 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/rsyslog4-mysql Makefile pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Rsyslog works based in input and output modules. The port sysutils/rsyslog4
  brings the core modules for basic functionality.
  
  -mysql outputs to a MySQL database
  
  PR:                     ports/130046
  Submitted by:   Cristiano Rolim Pereira <cristianorolim at hotmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1069    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/sysutils/rsyslog4-mysql/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/sysutils/rsyslog4-mysql/pkg-plist (new)
